summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ValuationResults page 2-column layout restructure. All requested features verified: desktop 2-column grid, sticky sidebar, mobile collapsible cards, section ordering, and CreateValuation dropdowns.

CreateValuation page - No error messages on page
